title: Interview Questions and Sources Site
subtitle: Static interview question hub for fresher, intermediate, and senior preparation, with Vietnamese and English reference links underneath.

question_sets.name: Fresher Interview Set
question_sets.summary: Entry-level interview quiz for Python basics, files, JSON, testing, and simple debugging.

question_sets.name: Intermediate Interview Set
question_sets.summary: Mid-level interview quiz for APIs, database work, async, retries, and implementation tradeoffs.

question_sets.name: Senior Interview Set
question_sets.summary: Hard interview quiz for scaling, reliability, architecture, operations, and AI/system tradeoffs.

question_sets.name: Bilingual VI/EN Interview Set
question_sets.summary: Vietnamese and English interview prompts for learning terminology and answer phrasing.

guides.title: Interview question sets live here
guides.note: Use this site for interview-style sets such as fresher, intermediate, senior, and bilingual interview prompts.

guides.title: Reference links stay secondary
guides.note: External links are supporting reading only. The core practice experience should stay in the local JSON quiz sets.

guides.title: Read in both Vietnamese and English
guides.note: Vietnamese helps fast understanding. English helps with global terminology and real interview phrasing.

vietnamese_sources.name: Viblo Interview - Python Tag
vietnamese_sources.focus: Community interview questions, answer discussion, and level-based browsing.
vietnamese_sources.best_for: Reviewing practical interview prompts and seeing how others answer.

vietnamese_sources.name: Viblo Interview - FAQ / Platform
vietnamese_sources.focus: Platform overview for contributing and browsing interview knowledge.
vietnamese_sources.best_for: Understanding how to use the Viblo interview ecosystem.

vietnamese_sources.name: TopDev - Python Interview Questions
vietnamese_sources.focus: Python interview traps and common question styles.
vietnamese_sources.best_for: Quick warmup on classic Python trick questions.

vietnamese_sources.name: TopDev Interview - Python Topic
vietnamese_sources.focus: Technical and soft-skill interview prompt collection around Python roles.
vietnamese_sources.best_for: Combining technical review with HR-style question practice.

english_sources.name: roadmap.sh Questions
english_sources.focus: Broad interview question collections by topic such as backend, SQL, REST API, DevOps, and data science.
english_sources.best_for: Topic-by-topic interview prep beyond Python only.

english_sources.name: InterviewBit - Python Interview Questions
english_sources.focus: Large Python question bank with tricky conceptual questions and explanations.

english_sources.name: GeeksforGeeks - Python Interview Questions
english_sources.focus: Broad Python interview coverage from syntax to advanced topics.

english_sources.name: GeeksforGeeks - Advanced Python Interview Questions
english_sources.focus: Advanced Python concepts such as exception handling, internals, and deeper language features.
english_sources.best_for: Harder technical interviews and senior-level prep.

english_sources.name: GeeksforGeeks - Python Data Structures Interview Questions
english_sources.focus: Interview patterns for lists, tuples, sets, dictionaries, and strings.
english_sources.best_for: Sharpening Python collection knowledge and code comparisons.

english_sources.name: roadmap.sh - Data Science Questions
english_sources.focus: Data science, machine learning, business communication, and practical interview framing.
english_sources.best_for: AI/ML interview preparation beyond code syntax alone.

study_paths.title: Basic Path
steps: Start with Python core collections and syntax.
Practice simple traps like mutable defaults, slicing, list multiplication, and identity vs equality.
Move into files, JSON, CLI, and small automation scripts.

study_paths.title: Intermediate Path
steps: Study APIs, retries, validation, testing, database transactions, and ORM behavior.
Add code comparison drills: memory usage, query count, repeated I/O, and cache tradeoffs.
Practice explaining when one implementation is safer or faster than another.

study_paths.title: Advanced Path
steps: Focus on system design, distributed consistency, observability, and resilience patterns.
Add AI/ML topics such as evaluation, RAG, embeddings, prompt injection, and production tradeoffs.
Train on failure modes, rollout strategy, and operational reasoning, not only happy-path design.
